options.content:
### dozzle-availability

The Dozzle hub remains reachable on the private runtime network for real-time container log access.

Service: `dozzle`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=dozzle-availability)

### excalidraw-availability

The private Excalidraw publication remains reachable through the authenticated LV3 edge.

Service: `excalidraw`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=excalidraw-availability)

### gitea-availability

The private Gitea runtime remains reachable for repository hosting, webhooks, and self-hosted CI orchestration.

Service: `gitea`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=gitea-availability)

### grafana-availability

Grafana remains reachable through the public LV3 edge.

Service: `grafana`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=grafana-availability)

### harbor-availability

Harbor remains reachable through the shared LV3 edge for image pulls, pushes, and operator access.

Service: `harbor`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=harbor-availability)

### openfga-availability

The private OpenFGA controller endpoint remains reachable for delegated authorization queries and bootstrap replay.

Service: `openfga`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=openfga-availability)

### openfga-latency

The private OpenFGA controller endpoint responds in under 500ms for 95% of probes.

Service: `openfga`

Latency threshold: `500ms`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=openfga-latency)

### homepage-availability

The unified operator dashboard remains reachable through the authenticated LV3 edge.

Service: `homepage`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=homepage-availability)

### keycloak-availability

Keycloak discovery remains reachable for operator and service authentication.

Service: `keycloak`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=keycloak-availability)

### keycloak-latency

Keycloak discovery responds in under 500ms for 95% of probes.

Service: `keycloak`

Latency threshold: `500ms`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=keycloak-latency)

### langfuse-availability

Langfuse remains reachable through the public LV3 edge for trace ingestion and operator access.

Service: `langfuse`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=langfuse-availability)

### matrix-synapse-availability

Matrix Synapse remains reachable on the public client versions endpoint.

Service: `matrix_synapse`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=matrix-synapse-availability)

### netbox-availability

NetBox remains reachable for inventory, IPAM, and topology workflows.

Service: `netbox`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=netbox-availability)

### nginx-edge-availability

The edge reverse proxy remains reachable for published services.

Service: `nginx_edge`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=nginx-edge-availability)

### open-webui-availability

Open WebUI remains reachable on the private runtime network.

Service: `open_webui`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=open-webui-availability)

### outline-availability

Outline remains reachable through the public LV3 edge for living knowledge browsing and sync automation.

Service: `outline`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=outline-availability)

### plane-availability

Plane remains reachable through the public LV3 edge for ADR board tracking and issue synchronization.

Service: `plane`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=plane-availability)

### platform-context-api-availability

The platform context API remains reachable for agent-assisted operator workflows.

Service: `platform_context_api`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=platform-context-api-availability)

### realtime-availability

The Netdata parent remains reachable on monitoring-lv3 for real-time streamed platform metrics.

Service: `realtime`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=realtime-availability)

### semaphore-availability

Semaphore stays reachable for private Ansible job launches and API-based task inspection.

Service: `semaphore`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=semaphore-availability)

### status-page-availability

The public status page remains externally reachable as the last-resort platform signal.

Service: `status_page`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=status-page-availability)

### uptime-kuma-availability

Uptime Kuma remains reachable through the public status surface.

Service: `uptime_kuma`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=uptime-kuma-availability)

### vaultwarden-availability

Vaultwarden remains reachable on the private Tailscale operator path.

Service: `vaultwarden`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=vaultwarden-availability)

### windmill-availability

Windmill API stays reachable for scheduled automation.

Service: `windmill`

[Open Grafana](https://grafana.lv3.org/d/lv3-slo-overview/lv3-slo-overview?var-slo=windmill-availability)
